title: Add 5-second loading state with optimization messages after device name entry

requirements.text: Add a 5-second loading state that displays after the user enters a device name and clicks the Generate button in DeviceNameScreen.tsx. Show two sequential messages during this loading period: 'optimising your device' and 'generating sensitivity for your device'. After the 5-second delay completes, display the sensitivity popup with the generated values.

quotes: when the device name is entered there should be a 5 seconds generation thelling that "optimising your device" and "generating sensitivity for your device"

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the Generate button triggers a 5-second loading state before showing the sensitivity popup
The loading state displays the message 'optimising your device'
The loading state displays the message 'generating sensitivity for your device'
After 5 seconds, the loading state disappears and the sensitivity popup appears with randomly generated Brazilian sensitivity values
The Generate button is disabled or shows a loading indicator during the 5-second delay

constraints: Do not modify the existing random sensitivity value generation logic (ranges 50-200 for all types)
Maintain the existing white input box styling
Keep the instant passkey validation with no loading state
Preserve the black and red color theme
nonGoals: Changes to the passkey authentication flow
Modifications to the sensitivity value ranges
Backend integration for the loading state
